signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires; Trump Confirms Iran Outreach Amid Ongoing Hormuz Blockade
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires; Trump Confirms Iran Outreach Amid Ongoing Hormuz Blockade | NO | MED confidence**

No ceasefire extension, resolution, or final deal has been confirmed or announced as of April 14, 2026—talks in Islamabad ended without agreement, but both sides are eyeing new negotiations this week before the two-week truce expires early next week.[1][

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts; Bank of Korea Holds Rates Steady Amid FX Volatility | YES | HIGH**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target despite global energy pressures from the Iran conflict.[1][3]
